title: Server Helper
description: Adds different utilities for server owners! Ranks, chat filtering, and all configurable!
body:
## Server Helper Adds tons of server-side tools to help out owners! #### Dimensions Path: config/serverhelper/dimensions.json
Command: /dimensions {enable|disable} {nether|the_end} #### Filter Path: config/serverhelper/chatfilter.json
Command: /filter {add|remove|list} {word|explicitWord|phrase|regex} #### Mute Path: config/serverhelper/chatfilter.json
Command: /mute {add|remove} {permanent|temporary} #### Ranks Path: config/serverhelper/ranks.json
Command: /rank {create|remove} (Name only required on create) /rank {assign|unassign}
